title: IronToThighs
description: Changes iron leggings and boots to thigh highs and changes chain armor to be rainbow!
body:
This texture pack changes iron leggings and iron boots to a pair of pink and white thigh highs! it also changes the texture of chain armor to resembe a rainbow!

The leather helmet has been removed for hypixel bedwars players to be able to see there and otheres wonderful faces!

Aditionaly the irem forms of both armor have been changed accordingly! and all helmets have a pair of can ears to creat a cute effect. 

I hope you enjoy a little extra spice for your game.
